specific_mechanism: Topos-elementary-classifier coevolution with new subobject parameters and new learnable classifier module (new module; regen attempt 2)
llm_application: Topos-elementary-classifier coevolution: introduce a NEW learnable module with its own parameters (new subobject parameters) implementing Topos-elementary-classifier coevolution; module adds new learnable classifier module and new coevolution pathway, creating new architectural-topology change distinct from baseline; module's parameters are not derivable from existing weights
